name: idol Live
developer: Zhejiang Tuxing Zhiyu Technology Co., Ltd.
publisher: Zhejiang Tuxing Zhiyu Technology Co., Ltd.
short_description: idol Live is a live broadcast software with both face capture and motion capture functions. Here you can transform into a future warrior and explore the future world, or become a person who asks the truth and asks the immortal, flying with a sword, or you can Become what you want!
detailed_description: "idol Live" is an auxiliary tool for streamers that uses real-time facial capture and motion capture (coming soon) technology to drive our delicate 3D idol characters, and then the user can conduct live streaming through streaming software like "OBS". The software currently has a digital female character and a male character. The software will continue to support multiple 3D characters for fun. Also, the software supports "spout2" video stream with alpha channel or you can use green screen background which can also be used to cut out the 3D character only.
about_the_game: "idol Live" is an auxiliary tool for streamers that uses real-time facial capture and motion capture (coming soon) technology to drive our delicate 3D idol characters, and then the user can conduct live streaming through streaming software like "OBS". The software currently has a digital female character and a male character. The software will continue to support multiple 3D characters for fun. Also, the software supports "spout2" video stream with alpha channel or you can use green screen background which can also be used to cut out the 3D character only.
supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*
*languages with full audio support
